value: A modern CRM and workspace for managing relationships, contacts, and company data with a programmable API.
Close is a CRM focused on sales teams that provides a REST API to access and manage leads, activities, contacts, and related CRM objects.
Customer support ticketing and helpdesk platform with APIs to manage tickets, contacts, agents, solutions and more.
Shared inbox and customer communication platform for teams (email, chat, social) with APIs and SDKs to integrate and extend Front.
A real-time chat platform for communities and developers offering text/voice/video, servers (guilds), channels, and a programmable public API for bots and integrations.
Cloud phone system & call center platform — REST API for calls, contacts, and webhooks to build integrations.
API to programmatically manage Google Ads accounts: campaigns, ad groups, ads, keywords, budgets, bids, account management, and reporting.
All-in-one marketing & CRM platform for agencies with a public REST API for integrations and Marketplace apps.
BigCommerce is a hosted e-commerce platform for building and operating online stores.
Amazon Selling Partner API (SP-API) — REST-based API for programmatic access to Amazon seller data (listings, orders, payments, reports, etc.).
Ahrefs provides SEO and backlink data products accessible programmatically via the Ahrefs API v3 for paying customers.
Platform for web scraping, automation and web data extraction (actors, datasets, key-value stores, task scheduling and webhooks).
Content delivery, security, and edge platform providing CDN, DNS, Workers, and many networking services accessible via APIs.
Datadog is a monitoring and observability platform for infrastructure, applications, logs, and more, offering REST APIs and SDKs to interact with product data and configuration.
Airtable is an app-building platform for creating and sharing business applications.
Work management platform for teams to track tasks, projects, and workflows; provides an API to create, read, update, and automate Asana data and embed app components.
Cryptocurrency exchange providing market data, spot/futures trading, wallets and partner integration APIs.
A unified corporate spend platform offering corporate cards, expense management, payments, travel, and related financial APIs.
Search engine that provides research-backed answers with citations from papers, abstracts, and clinical trials; offers team/enterprise features such as SSO and admin controls.
An autonomous AI software engineer (agent) that can write, run, and test code and expose functionality via a REST API for integrations.
